name: R-3 react detectors: every R-3 detector honors --dry-run per the §2.14 dry-run contract
command: for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do grep -q -- '--dry-run' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/$d.sh" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo all_dry_run 1>&2
